title: Agent & Plugin Restructure Design
summary: Split fzymgc-house plugin into homelab and pr-review plugins with native Claude Code agents and worktree isolation.
notes: Document contains architectural decision-making (Decisions section line 294-306) alongside technical specifications (agent matrix, input/output contracts, merge protocols). Classified as SPEC due to dominance of implementation specifications: agent definitions with tool lists, agent-to-orchestrator contracts, worktree merge protocol, and communication boundaries. Though Decisions section present, no explicit ADR status field (Accepted/Proposed/Superseded) found; document reads as design proposal/specification rather than locked architectural decision.
